channel.title: How can I add Disqus comments system to a Blog post
channel.description: I tried to find a tutorial of how to add Disqus comments system to Frontity, But I couldn't find any clear explanation with the `@frontity/disqus-comments` package. I did find an explanation in this post: https://frontity.org/blog/building-a-blog-using-frontity-and-wordpress/#add-disqus. But with another package ( disqus-react). I wonder if there is an explanation of how to use `@frontity/disqus-comments`?

item.title: How can I add Disqus comments system to a Blog post
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @jalaleddine.elhabbaz,

There was a @frontity/disqus-comments package in the old Frontity PRO, but it wasn’t migrated it to Frontity Framework.
So, there’s no current @frontity/disqus-comments and the reference to it in the docs should be removed

I have created a issue for rhis:

github.com/frontity/docs

Remove references to @frontity/disqus-comments in the docs: Namespaces

opened 01:35PM - 29 Jul 20 UTC
juanmaguitar

https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/namespaces https://community.frontity.org/t/how-can-i-add-disqus-comments-system-to-a-blog-post/2519

effort: low priority: medium source: community topic: packages type: bug

Now, this package is an open opportunity for any member of the community who wants to develop it.

In the meantime, the explanations provided in this post: t: https://frontity.org/blog/building-a-blog-using-frontity-and-wordpress/#add-disqus should be enough to implement disqus in a Frontity project

Read full topic
item.source: How can I add Disqus comments system to a Blog post

item.title: How can I add Disqus comments system to a Blog post
item.dc:creator: jalaleddine.elhabbaz
item.description:
I tried to find a tutorial of how to add Disqus comments system to Frontity, But I couldn’t find any clear explanation with the @frontity/disqus-comments package.
I did find an explanation in this post: https://frontity.org/blog/building-a-blog-using-frontity-and-wordpress/#add-disqus.
But with another package ( disqus-react).
I wonder if there is an explanation of how to use @frontity/disqus-comments?

Read full topic
item.source: How can I add Disqus comments system to a Blog post
